name: PitchCraft
description_en: Structured persuasion for tech leads, PMs, and founders—turn raw updates into briefings on a Hook→Context→Proposal→Evidence→Ask framework across five scenarios.
description_zh: 面向技术负责人、PM 与创始人的结构化说服——用 Hook→Context→Proposal→Evidence→Ask 框架,把零散信息整理成五类场景的简报。
long_en: Covers kickoff, status update, wrap-up, investor pitch, and solution selling; the agent prompts for missing materials and audience context and runs a pre-submit checklist.
long_zh: 覆盖启动、进展汇报、收尾、投资路演与方案销售;会主动追问缺失材料与受众背景,并在提交前过一遍检查清单。
sec_note_zh: 纯文本指导;不访问系统。
